message:
feat: add live TUI dashboard with pressure gauges and sparklines

- Add crossterm dependency for terminal manipulation
- Implement sbh dashboard with real-time pressure visualization
- Horizontal bar gauges with color-coded pressure levels
- EWMA trend sparklines using unicode block characters
- Rate history ring buffer with chronological normalization
- Ballast inventory and counters display
- Degraded mode: shows static fs stats when daemon not running
- Graceful exit on q/Esc/Ctrl-C with terminal state restoration
- 14 passing unit tests for rendering, formatting, and data structures
- Include concurrent agent changes to guardrails module

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
